zsh.c(3) Library Functions Manual zsh.c(3)

NAME

zsh.c - Zsh shell completion script generator with category grouping.

SYNOPSIS

Functions


asciichat_error_t completions_generate_zsh (FILE *output)

Detailed Description

Zsh shell completion script generator with category grouping.

Definition in file zsh.c.

Function Documentation

asciichat_error_t completions_generate_zsh (FILE * output)

Definition at line 173 of file zsh.c.

173                                                          {
174   if (!output) {
175     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "Output stream cannot be NULL");
176   }
177 
178   fprintf(output, "#compdef _ascii_chat ascii-chat\n"
179                   "# Zsh completion script for ascii-chat\n"
180                   "# Generated from options registry - DO NOT EDIT MANUALLY\n"
181                   "\n"
182                   "_ascii_chat() {\n"
183                   "  if [[ \"${words[2]}\" == -* ]]; then\n"
184                   "    _ascii_chat_discovery\n"
185                   "    return 0\n"
186                   "  fi\n"
187                   "  local curcontext=\"$curcontext\" state line modes\n"
188                   "  _arguments -s \\\n"
189                   "    '1: :->mode' \\\n"
190                   "    '(*):args:_ascii_chat_args' && return\n"
191                   "  [[ -n \"$state\" ]] || return 1\n"
192                   "  case $state in\n"
193                   "    mode)\n"
194                   "      local -a server_modes client_modes\n"
195                   "      server_modes=(\n");
196 
197   /* Generate server-like modes from registry */
198   size_t mode_server_count = 0;
199   const mode_descriptor_t *mode_server_descs = get_modes_by_group("server-like", &mode_server_count);
200   if (mode_server_descs) {
201     for (size_t i = 0; i < mode_server_count; i++) {
202       fprintf(output, "        '%s:%s'\n", mode_server_descs[i].name, mode_server_descs[i].description);
203     }
204     SAFE_FREE(mode_server_descs);
205   }
206 
207   fprintf(output, "      )\n"
208                   "      client_modes=(\n");
209 
210   /* Generate client-like modes from registry (exclude discovery since it's the default mode) */
211   size_t mode_client_count = 0;
212   const mode_descriptor_t *mode_client_descs = get_modes_by_group("client-like", &mode_client_count);
213   if (mode_client_descs) {
214     for (size_t i = 0; i < mode_client_count; i++) {
215       /* Skip discovery mode - it's the default when no mode is specified */
216       if (strcmp(mode_client_descs[i].name, "discovery") == 0) {
217         continue;
218       }
219       fprintf(output, "        '%s:%s'\n", mode_client_descs[i].name, mode_client_descs[i].description);
220     }
221     SAFE_FREE(mode_client_descs);
222   }
223 
224   fprintf(output, "      )\n"
225                   "      _describe -t server-modes 'server-like modes' server_modes\n"
226                   "      _describe -t client-modes 'client-like modes' client_modes\n"
227                   "      ;;\n"
228                   "  esac\n"
229                   "}\n"
230                   "\n"
231                   "_ascii_chat_args() {\n"
232                   "  case $words[2] in\n"
233                   "    server)\n"
234                   "      _ascii_chat_server\n"
235                   "      ;;\n"
236                   "    discovery-service)\n"
237                   "      _ascii_chat_discovery_service\n"
238                   "      ;;\n"
239                   "    client)\n"
240                   "      _ascii_chat_client\n"
241                   "      ;;\n"
242                   "    mirror)\n"
243                   "      _ascii_chat_mirror\n"
244                   "      ;;\n"
245                   "    discovery)\n"
246                   "      _ascii_chat_discovery\n"
247                   "      ;;\n"
248                   "    *)\n"
249                   "      _ascii_chat_discovery\n"
250                   "      ;;\n"
251                   "  esac\n"
252                   "}\n"
253                   "\n"
254                   "# Server-like modes: handle incoming connections and stream management\n"
255                   "_ascii_chat_server() {\n");
256 
257   /* Server options - grouped by category */
258   size_t server_count = 0;
259   const option_descriptor_t *server_opts = options_registry_get_for_display(MODE_SERVER, false, &server_count);
260 
261   if (server_opts) {
262     zsh_write_options_grouped(output, server_opts, server_count, "server");
263     SAFE_FREE(server_opts);
264   }
265 
266   fprintf(output, "  return\n"
267                   "}\n"
268                   "\n"
269                   "_ascii_chat_discovery_service() {\n");
270 
271   /* Discovery-service options - grouped by category */
272   size_t discovery_svc_count = 0;
273   const option_descriptor_t *discovery_svc_opts =
274       options_registry_get_for_display(MODE_DISCOVERY_SERVICE, false, &discovery_svc_count);
275 
276   if (discovery_svc_opts) {
277     zsh_write_options_grouped(output, discovery_svc_opts, discovery_svc_count, "discovery_service");
278     SAFE_FREE(discovery_svc_opts);
279   }
280 
281   fprintf(output, "  return\n"
282                   "}\n"
283                   "\n"
284                   "# Client-like modes: connect to servers or render local media\n"
285                   "_ascii_chat_client() {\n");
286 
287   /* Client options - grouped by category */
288   size_t client_count = 0;
289   const option_descriptor_t *client_opts = options_registry_get_for_display(MODE_CLIENT, false, &client_count);
290 
291   if (client_opts) {
292     zsh_write_options_grouped(output, client_opts, client_count, "client");
293     SAFE_FREE(client_opts);
294   }
295 
296   fprintf(output, "  return\n"
297                   "}\n"
298                   "\n"
299                   "_ascii_chat_mirror() {\n");
300 
301   /* Mirror options - grouped by category */
302   size_t mirror_count = 0;
303   const option_descriptor_t *mirror_opts = options_registry_get_for_display(MODE_MIRROR, false, &mirror_count);
304 
305   if (mirror_opts) {
306     zsh_write_options_grouped(output, mirror_opts, mirror_count, "mirror");
307     SAFE_FREE(mirror_opts);
308   }
309 
310   fprintf(output, "  return\n"
311                   "}\n"
312                   "\n"
313                   "# Discovery mode: find sessions via discovery service (default mode when no mode specified)\n"
314                   "_ascii_chat_discovery() {\n");
315 
316   /* For discovery mode, get all options (binary + mode-specific) in a single call */
317   size_t discovery_count = 0;
318   const option_descriptor_t *discovery_opts = options_registry_get_for_display(MODE_DISCOVERY, true, &discovery_count);
319 
320   if (discovery_opts) {
321     zsh_write_options_grouped(output, discovery_opts, discovery_count, "discovery");
322     SAFE_FREE(discovery_opts);
323   }
324 
325   // Return after all option sets are described (prevents zsh fallback completion)
326   fprintf(output, "  return\n"
327                   "}\n"
328                   "\n"
329                   "_ascii_chat \"$@\"\n");
330 
331   return ASCIICHAT_OK;
332 }




References get_modes_by_group(),
    options_registry_get_for_display(), SAFE_FREE, and
    SET_ERRNO.


Referenced by completions_generate_for_shell().








Author

    ascii-chat
